description: Per-run burn-scar inference probability raster over the AOI for a trailing Sentinel-2 L2A window, derived by running the pretrained Prithvi-EO 2.0 burn-scar downstream task (inference only). Detects burn scars — post-event spectral signatures of fires that already happened. Values are relative model scores, not calibrated probabilities and not fire forecasts. Fills the gap between the latest ICNF Áreas Ardidas vintage and the current date. See inventory.yaml: burn-scar-recent.
title: Recent burn-scar inference probability (Prithvi-Burn-Scar)
